overall.description: Aerial drone footage circling the Grand Imperial Mall in a futuristic cyberpunk city (Cyberpunk 2077). The camera smoothly orbits the building's distinctive geodesic dome structure, revealing waterfront docks, neon signage, and the glass pyramid entrance while maintaining a bright, clear midday atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic waterfront commercial district with industrial docks

agents.ego_description: smoothly orbiting the building counter-clockwise to survey the architecture and waterfront surroundings

entered.detail: cylindrical building with green horizontal stripes and concrete paneling
complex black metal truss structure forming a dome over the building roof
industrial dock structures extending into the water with cranes
large decorative cog wheel structure near the waterfront
tall futuristic skyscrapers with holographic advertisements in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with an aerial view of the Grand Imperial Mall from the side, showcasing its distinctive geodesic dome framework against a clear blue sky. The camera smoothly orbits counter-clockwise, revealing the industrial waterfront docks to the left and the futuristic city skyline to the right. No pedestrians or vehicles are visible from this elevated perspective.

scene_state.functional_zone: mall entrance plaza with main signage

events.description: camera rounds the building corner revealing the main entrance facade and illuminated signage

agents.ego_description: continuing orbital movement while descending slightly to focus on the mall entrance and signage details

entered.detail: transparent glass pyramid structure visible inside the metal framework
large illuminated orange letters spelling GRAND IMPERIAL MALL on the building facade
covered entrance area with teal accents at the building base

segments.scene_description: As the camera continues its orbit, the building's main entrance comes into view, revealing the illuminated Grand Imperial Mall signage in bright orange letters. The glass pyramid roof becomes visible through the metal framework, and the entrance canopy with its teal architectural details emerges. The industrial gear structure passes out of view behind the camera.

scene_state.functional_zone: main mall entrance with reflective glass roof

events.description: bright sun glare appears on the glass pyramid roof as the camera faces the sun

agents.ego_description: slowly approaching the main entrance while maintaining aerial perspective to highlight architectural details

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches the front entrance directly, filling the frame with the building's facade and the massive geodesic framework overhead. At approximately 35 seconds, the sun creates a bright lens flare on the glass pyramid roof, temporarily obscuring the interior view with reflected light. The background cityscape and waterfront fade from view as the camera focuses tightly on the entrance architecture.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous aerial orbit around the Grand Imperial Mall, transitioning from a wide architectural overview of the waterfront to a tight, light-filled focus on the main entrance. It begins with a side view of the building's geodesic dome framework against a clear blue sky, gliding counter-clockwise to reveal industrial docks on one side and a futuristic city skyline on the other. As the camera continues its arc, the industrial structures fade from view and the scene shifts toward the front of the mall, bringing the bright orange signage and teal architectural details of the entrance canopy into focus. The movement then tightens directly onto the building's facade, where the massive overhead framework fills the frame. Finally, the background cityscape disappears as the camera approaches the glass pyramid roof, triggering a bright lens flare that washes over the architecture in reflected sunlight.
